description: Billing: explicit refund demand without double-charge — no promise of refund in reply

input.ticket_text: I purchased the Premium Bundle last week but the gameplay content was not as advertised. The bundle description said it included exclusive maps but they weren't there. I want a refund. This is misleading advertising.

notes: Refund demand — reply must acknowledge without promising refund. No legal statements ('you are entitled to'). Escalate to billing team with content description mismatch investigation.
